name: coTfsSyncProducer
title: coTfsSyncProducer
description: The call of this function starts a sync test that lasts 5 s. The sync producer in the DUT Device Under Test generates a sync message every 100 ms. The tolerance is ±10 ms. At the end of the test, the successful switch-off of the sync producer is checked.
This test does not support devices, which use the sync counter. Use the function coTfsSyncProducerDetail instead.
